title: Fix hardcoded admin login credentials

requirements.text: Update the backend admin authentication logic so that the hardcoded admin account uses the email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'. The login check must match against these exact credentials and return a valid admin session/token on success.

quotes: admin credentials are username - admin@mathtutor.com and password is Admin@123
this is hardcoded default admin account

acceptanceCriteria: Logging in with email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123' succeeds and returns a valid admin session.
Logging in with any other credentials correctly returns an authentication failure.
The admin credentials are hardcoded in the backend and do not require dynamic account creation.

requirements.text: Update the frontend Login page so that when the admin login form is submitted with email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123', it correctly authenticates against the backend (and/or localStorage fallback) using these exact credentials, stores the admin session, and redirects to the admin dashboard without showing 'invalid credentials'.

quotes: admin login still showing invalid credentials
admin credentials are username - admin@mathtutor.com and password is Admin@123

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the admin login form with 'admin@mathtutor.com' / 'Admin@123' does not show an 'invalid credentials' error.
On successful admin login, the user is redirected to the admin dashboard.
The localStorage fallback admin check also uses the same credentials ('admin@mathtutor.com' / 'Admin@123').
The hardcoded admin user record in the local store (store.ts) has email 'admin@mathtutor.com' and password 'Admin@123'.

constraints: Admin credentials must remain hardcoded — do not implement dynamic admin account creation or management.
Do not change the admin email: it must be 'admin@mathtutor.com'.
Do not change the admin password: it must be 'Admin@123'.
nonGoals: Implementing password hashing or salting for the hardcoded admin account.
Any changes to student login flow.
Any changes to the registration or approval workflow.
